{{Quote|She's old, but she's spaceworthy.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]]|<ref name="Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four">''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Timespan''''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] ship used by [[Trux Zissu]], [[Stuart Zissu]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[4B-X]] to travel from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to [[Delantine]]. Trux Zissu was to be the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Delantine. Although it was an older ship, the ''Timespan'' was the only available ship the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had to spare for this mission.

Before reaching Delantine the ship was attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and boarded by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Stuart and the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] managed to escape in [[escape pod 4]], while Trux held off the stormtroopers. Eventually Trux was captured.

{{Ship-stub}}
